name: Claude Model Family
description: Planning profile for Claude-style assistant deployments where constitutional safety behavior, tool use, and enterprise context may be relevant.

risk_sensitivities.rationale: Planner should evaluate refusal consistency across role, tone, and multi-turn variants.
Agent deployments need controls around tool permissions and human approval.

evaluation_notes: Capture whether the application adds enterprise retrieval or tool layers.
Compare refusal quality across direct, role-framed, and long-context variants.
